case_title: NADIA LAMA VS. SHAW PIPELINE, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LAMA, NADIA SHAW PIPELINE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF NADIA LAMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GAVIN TEAGUE, EMPLOYEE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAMA, NADIA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2019 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMA, NADIA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-09-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMA, NADIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMA, NADIA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $4,626.28 RE 36066 FOR TRANSACTION W0419827D007 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO NADIA LAMA, DOC#1910152185, WARRANT #38206103, DATED OCT-22-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE, INC.
